instructions.instruction: Use this skill when a bug report exists but the right reproduction path and fix sequence are not yet clear.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when a bug report exists but the right reproduction path and fix sequence are not yet clear.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger triage-bug.

instructions.instruction: **Core principle:** Do not guess at fixes. Reproduce the bug, choose the right failing spec, then plan the smallest safe repair.
instructions.original_snippets: **Core principle:** Do not guess at fixes. Reproduce the bug, choose the right failing spec, then plan the smallest safe repair.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger triage-bug.

instructions.instruction: **Define the smallest fix path:** Name the likely files and the narrowest behavior change that should make the spec pass.
instructions.original_snippets: **Define the smallest fix path:** Name the likely files and the narrowest behavior change that should make the spec pass.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger triage-bug.

instructions.instruction: Fix path:  Orders::CreateOrder should return { success: false, error: "Out of stock" }
instructions.original_snippets: Fix path:  Orders::CreateOrder should return { success: false, error: "Out of stock" }
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger triage-bug.

instructions.instruction: Run it before implementing the fix: `bundle exec rspec spec/requests/orders/create_spec.rb`
instructions.original_snippets: Run it before implementing the fix: `bundle exec rspec spec/requests/orders/create_spec.rb`
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger triage-bug.
